name: Patient Measurement Clustering
shortDescription: Cluster patients by clinical measurement scores using KMeans
description: Takes an OMOP-format measurement table and clusters patients based on their clinical scores (e.g. HAM-D, PSQI, CDR). Pivots the data so each patient becomes one row, runs KMeans clustering plus PCA, and outputs a per-patient summary table with PCA coordinates, a severity cluster label, and clinical summary scores. Useful for identifying patient subgroups and plotting them as a scatter chart in Superset.
inputDescription: OMOP measurement table with columns: person_id, measurement_id, measurement_source_value, value_as_number

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

n_clusters.label: Number of Clusters
n_clusters.description: How many patient groups to create. 3 is a good default for most clinical datasets.

outputDescription: Per-patient summary table with PCA coordinates (pca_x, pca_y), cluster id, severity cluster_label, clinical summary scores (ham_d_total, psqi_total, cdr_score), and num_measurements
